Fixes the selection squares and the over-covered waveform.

### Fixed
- **Selection squares:** rating stars and inline icons no longer render as solid squares when a row is selected (the previous over-broad rule filled their SVG mask rects). Readable text is kept via targeted selectors.
- **Waveform:** the played portion is semi-transparent again so the waveform texture stays visible (v1.0.3 covered it completely), still in the full accent colour.

### Important — clear the skin cache
MediaMonkey caches compiled skins and will NOT recompile an update on its own. Delete `%APPDATA%\MediaMonkey5\precompiledLess_Flat Monkey Dark_Desktop.css`, then restart MediaMonkey.
